title: Backend Developer
description: Mid Yazılım Geliştirici 2–4 yıl deneyimli yazılım geliştiriciler için Quanticst Teknoloji olarak büyüyen ekibimize deneyimli bir yazılım geliştirici arıyoruz. Gerçek ve ölçeklenebilir projelerde söz sahibi olmak, modern teknolojilerle çalışmak ve kariyer yolculuğunda bir adım öteye geçmek istiyorsan bu pozisyon tam sana göre! Biz Kimiz? .NET Core & React.js ile kurumsal ölçekte uygulamalar geliştiriyoruz React Native ile çapraz platform mobil çözümler üretiyoruz Kubernetes & DevOps altyapısıyla sağlam ve ölçeklenebilir sistemler yönetiyoruz Teknik kararların birlikte alındığı, düz hiyerarşili ve hızlı büyüyen bir ekibiz Aranan Nitelikler C# / .NET Core 2+ yıl deneyim React.jsBileşen mimarisi & state yönetimi RESTful APITasarım & entegrasyon deneyimi Git & CI/CDVersiyon kontrol & pipeline yönetimi VeritabanıSQL & ORM kullanımı Takım çalışmasıAgile / Scrum ortamında çalışma deneyimi

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: About Us ideasoft is a technology company that will increase the competitiveness of companies of all sizes in the process of realizing their business goals, create added value, and produce quality, advanced projects and solutions. ideasoft has been growing rapidly since 2005 and offers web-based software, design and desktop software solutions to more than +45000 businesses in the field of E-Commerce We are looking for a skilled, motivated Software Developer to work in our office located in Dudullu-Ümraniye Büdotek. If you're a passionate software professional, a self-starter, a good problem solver and have a history of success in challenging and fast-paced environments, you could be the ideal candidate for this position. Required Skills, Knowledge and Experience BS degree in Software/Computer Engineering or significant relevant experience. Proven track record of a minimum 5 years experience of software development, including senior experience 3+ years experience in one or more modern PHP frameworks (Symfony, Laravel, Phalcon etc.) Experience with scalable and distributed SaaS systems Solid understanding of OOP concepts and software design patterns. Strong PHP programming expertise. Experience with multi-threading and memory management. Solid RDBMS knowledge like MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc. Experience NoSQL databases like MongoDB, Redis, CouchBase etc. Experience with message queues like Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc. Experience working in an agile development environment. Experience version control systems like Git etc. Comfort with UNIX/Linux environments. An analytical mind to grasp concepts and solve problems quickly. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. No military obligation for male candidates. Nice To Have Strong knowledge of architectural patterns like Modular Monolith, Microservice, SOA, Event-driven and CQRS Experience in Payment Systems Experience with Jira / Confluence project management tools Responsibilities Participate in the design and development phase of software production Perform code reviews to drive teams to the highest standards for backend development Preparing the relevant unit tests for the test scenarios of the applications To participate and contribute to technical and architectural discussions Mentoring junior developers What We Offer? The E-senlik Wellbeing Program we have prepared for employees Birthday leave Women's Day leave to women employees Full Health Benefits Meal Allowance Transportation allowance Unlimited snacks in the office

title: PHP Web Developer | Remote
description: Position: PHP Developer Type: Hourly contract Compensation: $50–$120/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10–40 hours/week Role Responsibilities Develop, test, and maintain scalable PHP-based web applications. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define requirements and architecture. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices. Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization. Integrate third-party APIs and web services. Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing. Continuously improve solutions based on evolving project needs. Requirements Strong experience in PHP development within professional environments. Solid expertise in web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and databases. Experience building and maintaining scalable web applications. Strong understanding of OOP, MVC frameworks, and RESTful APIs. Proficiency with version control systems such as Git. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Application Process (Takes 20 Min) Easy Apply on LinkedIn Check email for next steps Participate in resume evaluation & interview stage

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced "Full Stack Developer" The job is primarily remote but we expect the candidates to be in Istanbul. Join us if you have a penchant to develop solutions with cutting-edge applications for a better world. What Are The Required Qualifications? Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or related fields 5+ years of professional software development experience Deep understanding and demonstrated experience in .Net Framework and C# libraries Angular knowledge is required. Expert in .Net Technologies (MVC, Web Forms) and C# language Experience in RESTful & SOAP service technologies Knowledge of object-oriented programming Experience in relational databases, ability to write functions Capable of writing unit tests Deep understanding of Microservices Technologies Experience in RabbitMQ, ElasticSearch, Redis, Docker Experience in Banking is a plus For details: Visit: www.innovance.com.tr Follow us on LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/innovance-consultancy Follow us on Instagram: www.instagram.com/innovanceconsultancy Follow us on Medium: www.medium.com/innovance-company-blog Follow us on X: www.twitter.com/Innovance2017 Follow us on Threads: www.threads.net/@innovanceconsultancy
